prompt: My DHS pregen has been running for 17 hours. dhs pregen status says 21% done at 5.35 CPS, time remaining infinite. But dhs status shows 0.00 CPS globally and there are 0 DH players online. Is it stuck? How do I fix it?

assertions.text: Identifies the pregen thread is likely dead (silent death bug or stalled)
Explains that 'infinite' time remaining means momentary CPS is zero (division by zero)
Recommends stopping and restarting the pregen (dhs pregen stop then start)
Mentions that restarting skips already-generated LODs
Suggests a diagnostic step (jstack for worker threads, or checking data.sqlite mtime)
